title: bus.tengine.council.disagreement v1
description: When: The council (multi-model evaluation) produces divergent results and the models cannot reach consensus on the topic. Source: /tengine. Emitted when model results differ beyond a acceptable threshold, signaling a need for human arbitration or deeper analysis.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

topic.description: The topic or question that the council models were evaluating when disagreement occurred.

positions.description: Free-form JSON object mapping model name to the position/answer it returned; structure varies by council configuration.
